title: Spicy Tender Middle Eastern Beef Kebabs
description: A lean, protein-packed kebab with a fiery, aromatic seasoning, perfect for post-workout refueling while remaining kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: plain yogurt
ingredients.notes: use dairy‑free yogurt to keep kosher

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: wooden or metal; soak wooden if using

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
In a bowl, whisk together yogurt, olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, cayenne, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl, tossing to coat each piece thoroughly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour (up to 2 hours) to tenderize.
Thread 4–5 beef cubes onto each skewer.
Place the skewered beef on the preheated grill and cook 3–4 minutes per side, turning occasionally, until internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium‑rare or 160°F (71°C) for medium.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, optionally with a side of cucumber‑yogurt dip or flatbread.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro before serving.
